# branch_stats.stats_from_kernel { #tspaint.branch_stats.stats_from_kernel }

```python
tspaint.branch_stats.stats_from_kernel(kernel, xi)
```

Apply an endpoint posterior to a cached branch kernel (cheap; no ``expm``).

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**kernel**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[tuple](`tuple`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   A cached :func:`branch_kernel` result ``(dwell_cond, jump_cond, K)``.

<code>[**xi**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [(K, K) array_like]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Posterior over ``(parent_state, child_state)`` for this branch.

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[**dwell**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [(K,) ndarray]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Expected time spent in each state along the branch, under ``xi``.

<code>[**jumps**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [(K, K) ndarray]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Expected number of ``m -> n`` transitions (``m != n``), under ``xi``.
